title: GRANT COUNTY LACTATION SERVICES - 211info
text: FAMILIES FIRST PARENT RESOURCE CENTER GRANT COUNTY LACTATION SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Families can choose where and how to meet with a Certified Lactation Counselor (CLC) at Blue Mountain Hospital, home visits are available as well. 401 S Canyon Boulevard John Day, OR 97845 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Varies by service Email Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Grant County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Breastfeeding Support Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: HUMAN REPRODUCTION - BABY STEPS BIRTH AND BEYOND PRENATAL EDUCATION INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CHILDREN IN BETWEEN INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HEALTHY FAMILIES OREGON AND PARENTS AS TEACHERS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PARENTING CLASSES AND RESOURCE LIBRARY PUBLIC SAFETY - CHILD PASSENGER SAFETY SEATS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. FAMILIES FIRST PARENT RESOURCE CENTER
